digest.component_or_area: rebar infra/terraform adoption of snap shared auth/OIDC/ACM resources
propositions: Move snap-owned GitHub OIDC provider, wildcard ACM cert, and auth_host SSO stack from snap's shared terraform state into rebar's infra/terraform + rebar-tfstate, preserving physical snap-demo-* names.
Add hashicorp/random and hashicorp/archive to required_providers so random_password and archive_file resources init/validate.
Live resources are imported (not recreated) so the only plan diff is retagging to Project=rebar, with prevent_destroy on cert and CloudFront and no destroy/replace.
Cookie-signing SSM secret and auth_origin_secret are preserved on import via ignore_changes so no secret rotation occurs and the Lambda/CloudFront origin-secret handshake stays matched.
Apply completed cleanly with post-migration health check confirming auth.solutions.navateam.com/authorize still 302s to Google over the wildcard cert.
Fixed a token-purpose-confusion auth-bypass in auth/lib/cookie.js where a 'state' token could replay as a session cookie, by making cookie.verify() reject purpose-labeled tokens.
